description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, featuring a light gray brick exterior. The front facade includes a driveway with four parked cars, a small awning above the main entrance, and a balcony with a glass railing. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the building, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property is landscaped with two flowering trees and two leafy green trees, adding curb appeal and shade. The interior layout is visible from above, showing multiple rooms with distinct color schemes, including a pink-walled room and a blue-tiled bathroom. The house is set on a paved lot with a clear separation between the driveway and the landscaped areas.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, light gray brick exterior, large windows, a driveway with four cars, and landscaped with flowering and leafy trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with four cars, main entrance with awning, balcony, and landscaped trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, window placement, and partial view of the driveway and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with windows, visible interior rooms, and landscaped trees on either side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's depth, window arrangement, and the driveway curving around the trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a small awning, single door, steps, and a paved driveway; no porch or columns.
